title: charan820/PhantomCrowd-Simulacra
summary: PhantomCrowd AI Marketing Simulator 2026: Content Spread Forecasting with Local LLM

title: Dev-Art-Solutions/InferHub
summary: Self-hosted LLM inference mesh in .NET. One Ollama-compatible API in front, a pool of GPU worker nodes behind it — run the hub where you have no GPU, run nodes where you do. Pluggable backends (Ollama first).

title: TaeSooPark-PTS/LatticeAI
summary: Local-first private AI memory layer / Digital Brain for conversations, documents, decisions, and model-agnostic knowledge.

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli
summary: 🏆 Ultralight AI Coding Agent 2026 — Blazing CLI, Tiny Codebase, Full Power Free

title: unusdon/ai-chatbot-saas
summary: Open-source multi-tenant RAG chatbot platform. Train on PDFs/DOCX/URLs, deploy across web widget + Telegram + WhatsApp. 5 LLMs (OpenAI · Claude · Gemini · Deepseek · Ollama). Next.js + Postgres + pgvector. MIT.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: attenlabs/hotato
summary: Regression testing for voice agents. The transcript passed; the call failed. hotato scores the turn timing and checks what the agent said against what the backend did, then gates CI. Self-hosted, MIT.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: temiroff/Blacknode
summary: A visual runtime for AI, GPU computing, and robotics, workflow framework for AI agents. MCP-native typed graphs, visual editor, Python export.

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: XAIHT/Tlamatini
summary: Tlamatini is a self-hosted AI developer assistant for local or cloud LLMs: hybrid RAG over your codebase, a 79-tool multi-turn engine, a 74-agent visual workflow designer, and ACPX, a runtime for external coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor and Gemini CLI.

title: nikazzio/glossa
summary: Multi-stage AI translation pipeline for scholars. Desktop app powered by Tauri, React, and Rust. Supports Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, and Ollama.

title: K-Dense-AI/k-dense-byok
summary: An AI co-scientist powered by Scientific Agent Skills running on your desktop.

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: The open creative AI workspace

title: hidr4lisk/swarm
summary: A multi-agent worktable in your browser: several AIs sit at one table — chat, debate and act — coordinated by a leader. Runs on your API keys or CLIs, installed or from a pendrive. Windows & Linux, no account, open source.

title: rouges78/GameStringer
summary: Desktop app that auto-detects a game's engine, extracts the text, translates it with local or cloud AI, and re-applies the patch. 20+ engines, 20+ AI providers, 11 UI languages. Free & source-available, single-player focused.

title: marcimastro98/Xenon
summary: A 100% local, all-in-one dashboard for the CORSAIR Xeneon Edge (and any Windows browser). System monitor, media & mic, a voice AI that can build dashboard pages for you, a Stream-Deck grid, RGB lighting, and Twitch/OBS control. Free, open-source, no account.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: dovvnloading/Cortex
summary: Cortex is a fast, private desktop AI assistant for running local Large Language Models with Ollama. Everything stays on your device: no cloud, no external servers, and no third parties.

title: Natuworkguy/Flash
summary: An AI-powered command-line interface that bridges natural language and shell execution.
